stories.title: 12% revenue growth
stories.excerpt: From January to June revenue increased from $12,459 to $13,954.

stories.title: Decreased Credit card spend
stories.excerpt: Credit card spend saw a decrease of 8% from $3,490 in August to $3,210.

stories.title: Increased software spend
stories.excerpt: Software spend saw an increase of 16% from $3,283 in February to $3,808.

stories.title: Spike in spend on software
stories.excerpt: Current spend in September totaled $5,807, up 41% from $4,099 in August.

stories.title: Revenue trend reversal in Q3
stories.excerpt: Revenue patterns shifted significantly in Q3, driven by seasonal changes.

stories.title: Vendor consolidation opportunity
stories.excerpt: Four overlapping SaaS subscriptions identified across engineering and design.

stories.title: Operating expenses down 6%
stories.excerpt: Operational costs decreased from $28,400 to $26,696 due to facility optimization.

stories.title: Accounts receivable aging alert
stories.excerpt: Three invoices totaling $14,200 have exceeded 60-day payment terms.
